stemHtml: Your aircraft and an intruder are both TCAS II equipped. The information available to your TCAS equipment is…

options.a: two dimensional only: avoidance manoeuvres between both aircraft cannot be co-ordinated
options.b: three dimensional: avoidance manoeuvres between both aircraft cannot be co-ordinated
options.c: two dimensional: your TCAS can generate both TAs (Traffic Advisories) and RAs (Resolution Advisories)
options.d: three dimensional: your TCAS can generate both TAs (Traffic Advisories) and RAs (Resolution Advisories)
